title: DarkerNeon Pink
description: DarkerNeon cyberpunk styled gui and hud with pink palette color
body:
![Pink neon gui and hud](https://i.imgur.com/qeUmnAR.png)


DarkerNeon Pink Change the GUI in Minecraft Vanilla for a Neon Light Pink Style GUI.

- Hud icons change
- Menu background image
- Widgets menu textures
- Survival and adventure inventory
- Creative inventory
- All the containers from all the tables made, even villager inventory, horses, and all the others
